name: dryrun3-runner-failure-fixes
description: Fix three E2E runner failure modes: (1) empty judge prompt on resumed runs (JUDGE_COMPLETE threshold wrong), (2) T5 inheritance hard-crash when dependent tiers failed, (3) judge responding with prose instead of JSON (regex stops at first '}'). Use when dryrun experiments show high judge failure counts, T5 ValueError on inheritance, or zero-score consensus from prose responses.
